---
ID: US-OLV-038
Title: Capture account notes
Status: Code Present
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-16
Milestone: Port Accounts UX and complete module hub shell

As a account manager
I want to create structured meeting notes
So that decisions and context are retained with the account

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] NotesSection lists notes for the selected account.
- [ ] Users can create a note with a title.
- [ ] Note metadata includes date and attendees.
- [ ] Note body previews render without exposing raw JSON.

Notes: Note parsing/markdown support was refined later.
